failedAssertions.reason: Backend GET /api/v1/portal/dashboard returns only 3 highlight items instead of the required 4 stat cards. Frontend correctly renders all available data (Revenue run rate, Fulfilment SLA, Dealer coverage) with no undefined/null/skeleton values, but the backend data source only has 3 metrics.

Only 3 stat cards rendered with sparkline SVGs instead of the required 4. Root cause is the same as VAL-DASH-001: backend API returns only 3 highlights. The grid layout correctly supports 4 columns at desktop breakpoint.

Field name mismatch between backend API and frontend types. API returns: periodLockEnforced, autoApprovalEnabled, mailEnabled, mailFromAddress, allowedOrigins. Frontend expects: periodLockEnabled, autoApproveThreshold, emailNotifications, smtpFromEmail, corsAllowedOrigins. General section fields (companyName, currency, timezone, dateFormat) are not returned by the API at all, so all General fields show '—'.

blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Cannot simulate API failure in live environment without network interception. Error state code exists in the source (AlertCircle icon, 'Failed to load dashboard data.' message, Retry button with onClick={load}) but could not be tested against a real failing API.

appliedUpdates.description: Added 'Flow Validator Guidance: agent-browser' section with isolation rules, boundaries, and shared state concerns for concurrent browser testing.
